title: Espresso - Single Shot

description: Carefully pulled Espresso in ice. Please ask our baristas for choice of beans.

description: Please ask our baristas for choice of beans.

title: Americano - Hot
description: Please ask our baristas for choice of beans.

title: Cold Drip
description: Crafted using a slow, low-temperature extraction method, yielding a smooth, full-bodied profile.

title: Brewed
description: V60 filter manual brew coffee. Please ask our baristas for choice of beans.

title: Short
description: Choice of Dairy or Non-dairy milk. Equal-parts blend of intense espresso and silky steamed milk, offering a smooth, low-acidity profile in a refined, short pour.

title: Regular
description: Choice of Dairy or Non-dairy milk. Our tallest cup of Flat white offering a strong coffee-forward profile.

title: Fusion
description: Choice of Dairy or Non-dairy milk. Long milk coffee featuring a rich espresso base mellowed by a generous pour of silky steamed milk.

title: No.5 Hot
description: Choice of Dairy or Non-dairy milk. Served hot - rich espresso base mellowed by silky steamed milk and a touch of sweetened condensed milk for an indulgent finish.

title: No.5 Cold
description: Choice of Dairy or Non-dairy milk. Served cold - rich espresso base mellowed by silky steamed milk and a touch of sweetened condensed milk for an indulgent finish.
